hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "alembic downgrade|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE"; then echo "WARNING: 危險操作偵測！請確認你真的要執行：$CMD" && exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then cd /c/all/code/hcca/0413 && uv run --project apps/api ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; uv run --project apps/api ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi'
